basicInfo.name: Nightmare Kris
basicInfo.flavor: Kris the Dark Conqueror has become the Ruler of Purgatory. He is preparing to invade Terra.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Dark Slash
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 410% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 410% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Dark Whispers
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Soul Drain
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 20% of the caster's Physical Attack when an enemy falls in battle.

profile.story:
Kris is an elven noble of the highest caliber from Terra Kingdom.
When the Power of Destruction engulfed the continent, other nobles and kings were eager to sacrifice their people to preserve their own lives. However, Kris's father took the lead in the fight, embodying true nobility.
Despite his excellent political acumen and leadership, Kris's father lacked physical prowess, and his territory was constantly on the edge of collapse.
Witnessing this struggle inspired Kris to enroll in the Knight Academy and train relentlessly.
Kris's dedication made him a natural leader among the noble students, and he was seen as their champion to rival the commoner prodigy Rudy.
Though initially hostile toward Rudy, Kris grew to respect him as his equal, and the two formed a strong friendship.
Kris doesn't let his efforts show, but he always puts in an inordinate amount of extra work to ensure that his battles always go his way, especially when it comes to limiting casualties on his side.
He considers Rudy, a commoner, a close friend and rival due to his skill; he does not discriminate against anyone based on their birth.
He was framed for his men's murder by Dellons and forced into exile from Terra Kingdom, so he accepted the great demon Rahal into him.
Rahal continues to attempt to take over Kris's body by exploiting his weaknesses, but Kris's stalwart soul ultimately overcomes the temptation and makes the demon's power his own.
